Hello experienced guys, can you please suggest the best team I can build for the story and event stages? <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> <:pray:1356053116260454534>

From a bit of personal experience, Hellot-Catena, Faint and Aigis should be good enough for most of the early campaign. You'll want to get Thais for them though.

Arachne, Horla, Jenkin and Karen could also work well enough if you want to use Arachne right now, though she is weird to play well, she's very strong.

Take these with a grain of salt as I'm far from the best here.

hello! Im new to the game and wanna main daffodil! I currently have quite a few copies of her but was curious what the best teammates for her was?

You are in luck, since one of her best teammates is featured on the banner right now 

Your ideal team would be something like Arachne - Daffodil - Clementine - Horla/GDoll, but you can substitute for the missing characters with Casiah and Winkle until you get them

Arachne is your main priority, she is fine at E0, but more comfy to play at E2
Her wheel is great, but isn't necessarily required

If you choose to get either Horla from Moonless Guide or GDoll from her banner afterwards, do keep in mind that both of them want E1
ooooh perfect, I just got a copy of arachne, should i get her wheel too?
Nautila is also a reasonable substitution option
I also got horla today, so i was running daffodil, g-doll, horla, winkle . Should I change to daff, g-doll, horla and arachne?
Hmhm, I would say that her E2 is more impactful than her wheel, but you could get there with monthly dupes later, so grabbing a copy of the wheel isn't a bad idea

If your GDoll is E0, then I would still suggest to run Casiah over her
But it works great otherwise!!
I have a few dupe selectors I can use too, should I prio using that on gdoll to make her usable or arachne first
okii

I would prioritize Horla's E1 first 
But afterwards, it's probably GDoll's E1 -> Arachne's E2
Both of their banners are still up, so you can choose to distribute your pulls and dupes however you feel like
it's fun

Team for Arachne?
what’s your roster?

Hello everyone,

Started playing today and pulled arachne. Kind of a weird question but I am currently in ACT 1 - Chapter 2 and I don't really get why her card "Eternal Loom" hits so hard, I am OS every room & most bosses with barely help from support (I play her with Tinct - Casiah - Aigis) but the card alone does 350+. Does she scale well in the future? Is it just a start of the game thing?

personally, my only taste of """harder content""" being headbutting the third boss on the arcade train mode, she scales fairly well but have a weird playstyle, mostly because of her convoluted pursuit;

the 1 cost card is pretty idiotic on low level, but not that much on harder content;
Ive got Erica, Winkle, Tinct, Liz, Horla specifically. Also have Thais, Murphy fauxborn, Mouchette, Aurita, Tulu, Ramona, Ogier, Lotan, Aigis, Nautila, Thais, Leigh, Alva and Doll.

She is intended as more of a support than a dps in the endgame. Maybe a "sub dps" if you are being generous. But her base numbers on eternal loom are very high for where you currently are in the story.

You will start getting much more challenged by the story around chapter 7, especially if you start doing hardmode.
Thank you for the response. i'll continue then!
Other recent releases like vortice have also been quite strong into early story.

i'm loving her (Arachne), and yes, her Eternal Loom start from a pretty high place for early chapters, but when Elites and Bosses get to their 60k, 100k, 500k+, she gets pretty dependent on her Pursuit mechanic (rouse, have threads, THEN Annihilate or be in Ultra Round, THEN exalt, THEN use OTHERS commands), because that stacks absurds ammounts of Final Veridict, and that's funny

I see

Horla does two things really well. She gives you passive multipliers based on her stances and also when she exalts. For ghelot you want her in her anger stance pretty much 100% of the time. 

If you have her e1 she gives 1 cost aoe weakness and vuln on her strikes and defends.
Horla's anger stance will give you a "free" final damage multiplier. If you leap it sometime in the first battle then you just get a free multiplier to all damage for the rest of the stage.
But i have to be careful not to overleap it with another emotion, right?
Just dont play her cards first after anger
Right. If you are playing ghelot that just means you don't want to leap one of her non-anger cards or you will switch stances.
